title_en: Fresh vs. Fake OJ: The Truth!
hook_en: Watch me squeeze real oranges vs. pour from a carton!
hook_es: ¡Mírame exprimir naranjas reales vs. verter de un cartón!
key_message: Discover the difference: Real OJ is pure, while many commercial OJs are flavored and stored for months.
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Fresh-squeezed orange juice vs. PROCESSED: Commercial OJ from concentrate with added flavors — Commercial OJ sits in tanks for up to a year — flavor packs are added back

title_es: Secretos Ocultos del Jugo de Naranja Comercial
hook_en: Can you guess what's in your OJ?
hook_es: ¿Puedes adivinar qué hay en tu jugo de naranja?
key_message: Commercial OJ often hides behind flavor packs to taste fresh, but has been stored for long periods.
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Fresh-squeezed orange juice vs. PROCESSED: Commercial OJ from concentrate with added flavors — Commercial OJ sits in tanks for up to a year — flavor packs are added back
